headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Can Tell a Winner in Retail Just By Witnessing the Stores, Tapestry’s a Winner”
summary: Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE:TPR) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer talked about. Cramer highlighted the stock as one of the “terrific winners,” as he said: Even after this beatdown, there are some terrific winners in this market. Take Tapestry, the parent of Coach and Kate Spade, with a stock that’s up more than 84% over […]
